name: eva-layered-core
principle: organism.py is the tiny non-evolving kernel. A release is a complete, layered bundle: provider-neutral core + model adapters + tool runtime + human/approval + session store, wired by agent.py and gated by supervisor.py/tests.py.

layers.context.py: compaction policy layer: deterministic LLM-free budgeted view of the log
layers.self_model.py: generated self-knowledge (anatomy, skills, capabilities) derived from the live release
layers.tui.py: dependency-free status view: live, human-readable 'what EVA is doing now' tracking
layers.evals.py: golden-trace evals: replay recorded provider responses through the real adapter+loop+runtime (offline, gate-safe) + guarded live smoke
layers.prompt_audit.py: opt-in prompt admission audit: deterministic prompt-surface diff + static rules + optional nonce-guarded LLM judge (sensor on promotion, never an anchor)
